hero.title: Ɗaɓɓugo taskaram jaahangal
hero.lead: IATF ɗon laara dookaji ngam kujeji je footi heɓa je ɗon fuɗɗama ha nder haaje goonga.
support: On don mari haaje limtolji je timmi. Matinol je mari laaɓɗum, je ɗon mari batakkeji, be ngam ɗume ɗum mari mangu, ɗon heɓa ngam fuɗɗugo.

intro: Laawolji fu ɗon nder lartol gootol.

items.label: Web siteji
items.body: Naftir foorma ha les ɗo ngam wurtinugo doolugo dabareji feere-feere.

items.label: Emailji
items.body: Lollinol ngol to {{contact.requestsEmail}}E-mailji je ɗon ɗaɓɓa footi laato defte je yimɓe ɗon ɗaɓɓita ha ɓawo lartol be senndol.

items.label: Wurtinol
items.body: Fuɗɗam ton to ɗum ɓurndi saɗugo. Jaɓɓorgo ɗon yahda ha nder lartol gootol.

guidance.title: Haande a nelda do'aare
paragraphs: IATF ɗon huwa ha nder ummaatoore. Kujeji je footi hauti be wurtinama ha nder defte kujeji ha nder jaahargal GitHub, ha nder duniyaru ndu, mala fuu ɗiɗi.
Wonda be adresji feere-feere, limɗe fownde, matinolji lekki, mala andal andal dow yimɓe je ɗon huwida be kujeji wallugo, sey ni to ɗum mari haaje be on jaɓii IATF foonda ɗum.
IATF ɗon itta matinolji laɓɓinolji je wala naffuugo hiddeko ɓe wurtina kujeji jaɓɓol.

review.title: Laarugo tammundeji
paragraphs: IATF ɗon raara dookaji ngam kuugal je ɗon lati, je ɗum footi waɗugo, be naffuda, be to kugal je ɗon nder babal babal ko yimɓe je mari.
Lammbuɗe feere footi sallaama, jaangina, mala wangina yeeso jaɓɓugo.

fields.name: Wurtinolji
fields.label: Bayanuji nastinol
fields.helper: Email address mala Discord handle ngam tokkitol.

fields.name: ɗemngal
fields.label: Ɗemngal
fields.helper: Ɗemngal je on ɓuri yiɗugo, to ɗum lati.

fields.name: caɗeele
fields.label: Ɗume woni caɗeele ɗe a yiɗi timmugo?
fields.helper: Wi'u ko haɗata man nder ɗemngal laaɓal.

fields.name: extraContext
fields.label: Ɓesdugo haala
fields.helper: Hokka goɗɗum feere je ɗon wallina faamugo haaje: ngam ɗume ɗum mari feerootiral, misaalji, tinndolji, dabare kujeji, mala ko hauti be wakkatiiji.

fields.name: openSourceConsent
fields.label: A ɗon nana belɗum be jahol yeeso maral maɓɓitol je ummaatoore?
fields.helper: Kujeji jaɓɓaama je limtol ummatore les IATF.

items: Jaɓɓorgo Kuwtorɗe nder taskaram GitHub IATF
injinjo je ɗon mari hakkiilo je ɗum hokki kuje man
lisansa copyleft ngam lawol be kuje taskaram

header.title: Jaabawol seɗɗa, je ɗon laaɓɗum lati ngam fuɗɗugo

paragraphs: To on mari haaje je ɗon mari jahol yeeso e on tammi yo'o ɗum laato taskaram ummatore, nelan min ndu.
